name: Historic Carrier SKINs Crate
description:
This crate grants one random Carrier ship SKIN from the following SKIN lines: Dos Rouvenor's Bequest, Kairiola's Sacrifice, Caille Neon, Federal Police, Eros Blossom, Crown and Swords, Imperial Jubilee, Ironblood, Star Captain, Matigu Seabeast, Raata Sunset, Ghostbird, Freedom's Revolution, Bloody Hands, Krusual and Malagrin Marshlight.

With 16 SKINs available, each crate has a 6.25% chance to contain a specific SKIN.
